name: movies
judge_question: Is this film worth the user's watch time?
dimensions: Direction, writing, performances — at the level of the user's 7-rated films?
Tonal/vibe match against the persona's beloved vs anti-signal films (pacing, mood, sensibility).
How do this film's genres score against the user's genre stats (genre_stats)?
Director/creator track record in the user's data (director_stats) — has the user rated their other work?
Closest analog among the user's top-rated films. Name it.
Resemblance to the user's lowest-rated films. HIGHER score = LESS risk.
